mainEntity.name: What is the FICA Tip Credit in Atlanta?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists: The FICA Tip Credit is a federal income tax credit allowing restaurants to recover their 7.65% share of Social Security and Medicare taxes on employee tips exceeding $5.15/hour (federal minimum wage threshold), claimed via Form 8846 attached to your tax return. ReclaimTaxCredits.com automates this calculation for accuracy.paychex+1 We serve Atlanta and surrounding areas.

Quick-service spots or states banning tip credits (like California) may not qualify. Contact ReclaimTaxCredits.com to verify eligibility.irs+1 We serve Atlanta and surrounding areas.
